statement.headerDoc:
STEP k-Lehmer — Smallest composite with φ(n) | (n-k) for k = 2..10
  ===================================================================

  Continuation of Paper 120 Q23:
    "For small k > 1, what is the smallest composite n with φ(n) | (n-k)?"

  Empirical (scripts/k-lehmer-search.ts):

    | k | smallest composite n | n-k | φ(n) |
    |---|----------------------|-----|------|
    | 1 | (none found to 10^5, Lehmer OPEN) | — | — |
    | 2 | 4                    |  2  |  2   |
    | 3 | 9                    |  6  |  6   |
    | 4 | 6                    |  2  |  2   |
    | 5 | 25

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
